prompt: Create a cinematic, high-aesthetic street photograph of a young woman with a short dark bob haircut walking through a crowded urban crosswalk or busy city street in Japan. She is shown from the side in a close medium shot, slightly off-center to the right, wearing a loose white shirt layered over a dark plaid dress or pinafore, with a thin shoulder strap visible and small earrings catching the light. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular privacy block, while her hair and clothing remain sharply lit. The background contains a bustling crowd of pedestrians, tall city buildings, signage, and traffic shapes, all rendered as heavy bokeh and motion blur. Use a dynamic Dutch angle, shallow depth of field, 35mm film photography look, vibrant teal-blue shadows and warm orange highlights, strong backlight from the late afternoon sun, high contrast, lens bloom, slight chromatic aberration, candid snapshot energy, fashion street-style mood, ultra aesthetic composition, natural imperfections, no readable text.
